message: Recompute every unbound Card number from raw: 56 -> 0 unbound, 66/66 cards clean and sealed. 4 did NOT reproduce and were corrected not promoted (promoted_sources 1->2, promoted_rows 286->155, colocation MAE 0.29->0.2768, regime discarded_pre2020_upward_steps 7 -> NOT REPRODUCIBLE).
